data.HISTORY: Pathology reviewed; margins clear. Recommend adjuvant therapy. Patient admitted for scheduled chemotherapy, tolerating regimen well. No new complaints. Vital signs stable. Continue current management plan. Discussed treatment options and plan at multidisciplinary meeting.
